S.FORM: = Norodom Sihamoni = Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 5 jiyax 14 ka Norodom Sihamoni ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Cambodia ta sayang o kiya ka Norodom Sihamoni, pnaah hngkawas 2004 idas 10 jiyax 14 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = noɾodom siħamoni = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka noɾodom siħamoni ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦambodia ta sajaŋ o kija ka noɾodom siħamoni, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Norodom Sihamoni = Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 5 jiyax 14 ka Norodom Sihamoni ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Cambodia ta sayang o kiya ka Norodom Sihamoni, pnaah hngkawas 2004 idas 10 jiyax 14 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = noɾodom siħamoni = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka noɾodom siħamoni ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦambodia ta sajaŋ o kija ka noɾodom siħamoni, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
